subcodes.title: Words to two prominent Persians, spoken on 1913-01-25
subcodes.first_line: It is natural in man to oppress. When two individuals fight, they go before the civil court and settle their differences but there is no law or court whereby the nations may resort thereto
subcodes.subjects: @competition vs. cooperation; the struggle for existence, @past, present and future of Iran, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
